sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53777" key="katagewmetre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταγεωμετρέω</orth>, <sense id="n53777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">geometrize, turn into geometry</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὴν φύσιν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> </bibl> </cit> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inPh.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg001:1341:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1341.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
